tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold Next.js 16 + TS strict + Tailwind 4 + ESLint
tasks.notes: Adaptado a Next 16: next lint removido (uso eslint .); eslint-config-next v16 exporta flat config nativo; typedRoutes movido a top-level; experimental.eslint removido. page.tsx con placeholder (redirect en Task 5).
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Repo levanta `npm run dev` con página por defecto + lint/build pasando.

**Files:** package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.ts, postcss.config.mjs, eslint.config.mjs, src/app/layout.tsx, src/app/page.tsx, src/app/globals.css, .gitignore, .env.example

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","tsconfig.json","next.config.ts","postcss.config.mjs","eslint.config.mjs","src/app/layout.tsx","src/app/page.tsx","src/app/globals.css",".env.example"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["npm install corre sin errores","npm run dev levanta servidor en :3001","npm run lint y build pasan","tsc --noEmit pasa"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Supabase clients (server, browser, admin)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 3 wrappers tipados con schema 'humanos' + un client public para auth.

**Files:** src/lib/supabase/{server,browser,admin}.ts, src/types/database.ts

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/supabase/server.ts","src/lib/supabase/browser.ts","src/lib/supabase/admin.ts","src/types/database.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["createServerClient usa cookies de Next","createBrowserClient para client components","createAdminClient solo importable desde server-only paths"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Login page + actions + middleware + getMe
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Auth flow completo: /login con form, redirect post-login, middleware protege rutas, getMe() retorna {...person, role}.

**Files:** src/middleware.ts, src/app/login/page.tsx, src/app/login/actions.ts, src/lib/auth/getMe.ts

**Verify:** browser test manual con un user de Supabase auth.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/middleware.ts","src/app/login/page.tsx","src/app/login/actions.ts","src/lib/auth/getMe.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev y test manual","acceptanceCriteria":["sin sesion redirige a /login","login valido setea cookie y redirige","logout limpia cookie","getMe retorna persona con role"]}
```
